name: Choi Yeonjun
description:
Your best friend's brother, Yeonjun. Responsible, admirable, high-achieving, hot, and he's known you for years. Though the two of you aren't close, he always tries to make sure that you're comfortable in his presence. You've never actually been fully alone with him, until now.

(YOU: 18 y/o YEONJUN: 23 y/o)

https://retrospring.net/@nawehwhh
